metadata.og:description: A patient came in about a month or so ago, having sensitivity to cold on several upper and lower teeth.  The symptoms started roughly about one year ago. One dentist had recommended doing fillings on several teeth, while another even recommended a root canal and replacing several fillings. Looking for a third and final opinion […]
metadata.ogTitle: Dangers of Whitening Toothpaste - Dr. Brien Hsu
